Interface ModelElementFinder

All Known Implementing Classes:
JDBCMetaDataBasedModelElementFinder
public interface ModelElementFinder
Finds model-elements (tables and associations).
Author:
Ralf Wisser

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Collection<Association>
    findAssociations(DataModel dataModel, Map<Association,String[]> namingSuggestions, Session session, ExecutionContext executionContext)
    Finds a set of Associations.
    List<Column>
    findColumns(Table table, Session session, ExecutionContext executionContext)
    Finds the Columns of a given Table.
    Collection<Table>
    findTables(Session session, ExecutionContext executionContext)
    Finds a set of Tables.
    Map<Pair<Table,Column>,String>
    getComments()
    Finds comments for all model elements.

  • Method Details

    • findTables

      Collection<Table> findTables(Session session, ExecutionContext executionContext) throws Exception
      Finds a set of Tables.
      Parameters:
      session - the statement executor for executing SQL-statements
      executionContext - the execution context
      Returns:
      a set of Tables
      Throws:
      Exception - on each error

    • findColumns

      List<Column> findColumns(Table table, Session session, ExecutionContext executionContext) throws Exception
      Finds the Columns of a given Table.
      Parameters:
      table - the table
      session - the statement executor for executing SQL-statements
      executionContext - the execution context
      Returns:
      the list of columns found for the given table
      Throws:
      Exception - on each error

    • findAssociations

      Collection<Association> findAssociations(DataModel dataModel, Map<Association,String[]> namingSuggestions, Session session, ExecutionContext executionContext) throws Exception
      Finds a set of Associations.
      Parameters:
      dataModel - model containing already known elements.
      namingSuggestions - to put naming suggestions for associations into
      session - the statement executor for executing SQL-statements
      Returns:
      a set of Associations
      Throws:
      Exception - on each error

    • getComments

      Map<Pair<Table,Column>,String> getComments()
      Finds comments for all model elements.
      Returns:
      map from element (table, column) to the comment
